task: Fix Android download, storage permission, pull-to-refresh, real-time sync
files_changed: app.html — JS rewritten: getCapFilesystem, requestStoragePermission, initNativePermission, syncNativeFiles, startSyncPolling, stopSyncPolling, addPullToRefresh, startDownload, stopDownload, boot sequence

bugs_fixed.CRITICAL_1: Wrong Capacitor Filesystem API — window.CapacitorFilesystem -> window.Capacitor.Plugins.Filesystem via getCapFilesystem()
bugs_fixed.CRITICAL_2: Permission never requested on first launch — initNativePermission() now called at boot
bugs_fixed.CRITICAL_3: storagePermGranted flag never re-checked after manual grant — now calls checkPermissions() live before every sync
bugs_fixed.CRITICAL_4: startDownload() did not trigger file sync — now starts startSyncPolling() (45 attempts x 4s = 3min)
bugs_fixed.MODERATE_5: No pull-to-refresh — addPullToRefresh() attached to all 4 pages via touch events
bugs_fixed.MODERATE_6: Real-time: pull-to-refresh now gives on-demand refresh on all pages; home still polls every 3s
bugs_fixed.MINOR_7: Added READ_MEDIA_AUDIO to AndroidManifest for complete Android 13+ media coverage

style_notes: Matched callApi pattern, showToast, animateValue. No new CSS except injected @keyframes spin for PTR.
